# OpenJarvis Vendor Slot

Reserved for a future audited checkout or source snapshot of:

https://github.com/open-jarvis/OpenJarvis

Do not clone or run until `audits/vendor_clone_checks.md` has an entry for OpenJarvis.

Research focus:

- local-first inference;
- cost and latency routing;
- energy/FLOP/accuracy evaluation;
- trace-based learning.
